title: Inside Meta’s Indianapolis bootcamp for data center technicians
description:

description:

title: US producer prices spike as soaring energy prices fuel largest yearly jump since 2022
description:

title: Gary airport board approves $16M construction contract for new control tower
description:
The Gary/Chicago International Airport Authority took a major step toward replacing its aging air traffic control tower Wednesday, after unanimously approving a $16.1 million construction contract.

title: Bloomington to cut ribbon on long-awaited Retreat @ The Switchyard
description:

title: Oakland City University employees sue university for unpaid wages
description:
An Oakland City University women’s soccer coach has filed a lawsuit against the university that claims the school hasn’t paid her or other employees since late April.

title: Recount Commission replacement sought in narrow Indiana Senate primary
description:
State Sen. Liz Brown is asking an Indiana Recount Commission member to step aside from the review of her narrow Republican primary win because of campaign contributions he made to her opponent.

title: Indiana Beach prepares for 100th anniversary celebration
